case_title: JESSE C RALPH ESQ VS. SENAIT AFEWERK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2015 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-28-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CASE CANNOT BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS STATED AT TODAYS HEARING; DEFENDANT HAD FILED A NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS ON JULY 6, 2015 WITH THE COURT; CASE IS CONTINUED TO A FUTURE DATE OF 1/28/16. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY RALPH ESQ, JESSE C AS TO DEFENDANT AFEWERK, SENAIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FROM BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO (REASON: ARBITRATION OF ATTORNEY FEES) FILED BY DEFENDANT AFEWERK, SENAIT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-28-2016 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $115.00 - SERVED JUN-18-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AFEWERK, SENAIT
